content: Ultimate Vault Hunter Upgrade Pack Two: Digistruct Peak Challenge
name: Legendary Catalyst
description: Legendary Maliwan class mod for Gaige the Mechromancer, part of the Digistruct Peak content. Built around More Pep, Electrical Burn, Evil Enchantress, Wires Don't Talk, Interspersed Outburst. Significantly boosts team elemental damage.
notes: Requires the Digistruct Peak Challenge DLC. Sub-level 50 versions are not obtainable legitimately.

special.description: At max level: +62% team elemental effect damage.
special.title: Shocking, isn't it?
